goal: Generate a compact landscape graphical abstract summarizing the observation-level framework for digital twins in manufacturing.

article_context.paper_theme: observation-level framework for digital twins in manufacturing

instructions: Lay out four main stages from left to right.
Stage 1 should show production video input.
Stage 2 should show detection plus tracking as one compact perception block.
Stage 3 should show observation variables such as occupancy, entries, exits, dwell time, and heatmaps.
Stage 4 should show digital twin monitoring outputs and reporting.
Keep the visual formal, sparse, and publication-ready.

nodes.label:
Observation Variables
occupancy, entries, exits,
dwell time, heatmaps

Digital Twin Monitoring
reports, dashboards,
decision support

caption_hint: Compact graphical abstract summarizing the proposed observation-level framework for digital twins in manufacturing.
